---
title: "Run Infant Data Pipeline (Nested Ingestion)"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
working_dir <- getwd()

source(file.path(working_dir, "code/functions/process_mom_baby_link.R"))
source(file.path(working_dir, "code/functions/process_delivery_encounter.R"))
source(file.path(working_dir, "code/functions/process_infant_icd.R"))
source(file.path(working_dir, "code/functions/process_apgar.R"))

source(file.path(working_dir, "code/functions/nested_ingestion_mom_ehr.R"))

registry <- load_dataset_registry()

sites <- c("GNV", "JAX")

message("=== STEP 1: MOM BABY LINK ===")
mom_baby_link_list <- lapply(sites, function(site) {
  message("Running mom_baby_link for ", site)
  process_mom_baby_link(site, working_dir, registry)
})
names(mom_baby_link_list) <- sites

message("=== STEP 2: DELIVERY ENCOUNTER ===")
delivery_list <- lapply(sites, function(site) {
  process_delivery_encounter(site, working_dir, registry, mom_baby_link_list[[site]])
})

message("=== STEP 3: INFANT ICD ===")
icd_list <- lapply(sites, function(site) {
  process_infant_icd(site, working_dir, registry, mom_baby_link_list[[site]])
})

message("=== STEP 4: APGAR ===")
apgar_list <- lapply(sites, function(site) {
  process_apgar(site, working_dir, registry, mom_baby_link_list[[site]])
})

message("=== STEP 5: COMBINE ===")
mom_baby_link_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(mom_baby_link_list)
delivery_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(delivery_list)
icd_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(icd_list)
apgar_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(apgar_list)

message("=== STEP 6: EXPORT ===")
export_processed_dataset(mom_baby_link_all, "mom_baby_link_all_sites", working_dir = working_dir)
export_processed_dataset(delivery_all, "delivery_encounter_all_sites", working_dir = working_dir)
export_processed_dataset(icd_all, "infant_icd_all_sites", working_dir = working_dir)
export_processed_dataset(apgar_all, "apgar_all_sites", working_dir = working_dir)

message("Pipeline complete.")
```
